eny.

E-Transformation & Solutions

Cash Management Hub

Manage Bank Hub, e-Collection, MT940 reconciliation directly within your business software.
e-Government Series

Install fully compliant e-Invoice and e-Ledger solutions naturally on your accounting system.
e-Commerce & Marketplace

Manage Shopify and marketplace orders, including payment and commission flows.
E-Collection Platform

Collect secure online payments from customers and dealers in seconds.
E-Statement & Open Banking

Open Banking solution that manages all bank accounts from a single panel.
E-POS Tracking & Reporting

Reporting solution that manages physical and virtual POS movements from a single panel.
E-DBS System

Manage your multi-bank Direct Debit System processes from a single panel.
E-Payment (Bulk)

Securely send your bulk payments to all banks simultaneously.
E-Cash Flow

Financial visibility and AI-powered cash forecasting platform.

Financial Transformation with eny

Transform your costly manual banking and accounting operations end-to-end with our high-performance platform.

01 / PLATFORM

Every Financial Process.
One Platform.

From regtech to fintech, from e-commerce to treasury management — every solution you need is under the eny umbrella.

REGTECH

e-Transformation Series

Turn legal requirements into an operational advantage. GİB-compliant, auto-updating, zero-error tolerance.

  • → e-Invoice & e-Archive
  • → e-Ledger
  • → e-Waybill
Explore Details →
FINTECH

Smart Collections & Payments

Manage the flow of money like a symphony. Omni-channel collection, smart routing, instant reconciliation.

  • → Global e-Collection
  • → e-Payment & BPS
  • → e-DBS
Explore Details →
E-COMMERCE

Next-Gen Commerce

Transform your digital store into a global financial center. One-Click Pay, fraud protection, and marketplace support.

  • → Checkout Excellence
  • → Subscription & Recurring Payments
  • → Fraud Protection (AI)
Explore Details →
TREASURY

Cash Flow Analytics

Turn data into decisions, and decisions into profit. 98% accurate cash projection and risk analytics.

  • → Cash Flow Projection
  • → Board Reports
  • → Customer & Dealer Risk Analytics
Explore Details →
03 / INTEGRATION

Works Flawlessly
With Your System.

Native integration with all ERP systems, primarily modern ERPs. Or use it from scratch as a self-sufficient financial operating system.

For ERP Users

  • ✓ Fully ERP compatible
  • ✓ Integration with other ERPs
  • ✓ API-first architecture
  • ✓ Data synchronization
Integration Docs →

For Non-ERP Users

  • ✓ Quick setup (< 1 day)
  • ✓ Easy-to-use interface
  • ✓ All processes in one panel
  • ✓ Get started immediately
Get Started →
